name: Enumerable
comment:
This module documents a simple approach to enumeration.

    "An enumeration is a complete, ordered listing of all the items in a collection."


# Enumerable

@docs Enumerable, toList

aliases.name: Enumerable
aliases.comment: A function that implements an enumeration over a type of value.

values.name: toList
values.comment:
Get a list of all distinct values enumerated.
The values are ordered according to the enumeration, starting with the given value.
